title: CBB Rulebook Volume 2 Operational Risk Management Module OM-5.5 Cyber Security Risk Management
summary: Applies the banking cybersecurity framework to Islamic bank licensees, including governance, senior management responsibility, data classification, cyber strategy and policy, controls, incident detection, recovery, training and regulatory reporting.

theme_notes.cybersecurity.security_controls_framewor: Cybersecurity risk management rules for Islamic bank licensees.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.incident_reporting: Cyber incident reporting rules for Islamic bank licensees.

notes: Related instruments: Related to CBB Appendix A Cyber Security Control Guidelines and CBB Cyber Security Requirements Letter 2025
